title: Labour must 'meet the moment' on defence spending, says Jarvis
description: The new defence secretary tells the Sunday Telegraph he is determined to ensure the military gets "what they need".
content:
The new Defence Secretary, Dan Jarvis, has said the government must "meet the moment" when it comes to the challenge of increasing defence spending.

title: Does the UK have a blind spot on UFO sightings?
description: A campaigner is calling on the government to resume investigations into alleged encounters.
content:
After more than four decades in the cockpit, retired pilot Chris Crowther has seen just about everything the skies can offer.
Over a 42-year career, he logged an extraordinary 22,000 flying hours on routes around the globe.

title: As Trump turns 80, what's it like to work as an octogenarian?
description: As President Donald Trump celebrates his birthday, we ask people who have worked into their 80s themselves about what it takes to keep going.
content:
In February, Arthur Rose stepped into his office as an internist doctor for the last time after practising medicine for over 65 years.

title: 21-Year-Old Brazilian Woman Dead After Bungee Jump Workers Push Her Off Bridge Without Safety Cord
description: A 21-year-old woman reportedly died Saturday when staff at a bungee-jumping event pushed her from a bridge without her being strapped to a safety rope, dropping her about 130 feet… The post 21-Year-Ol...
content:
